channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TokenScope: Token-Level Explainability and Interpretability for Code-Oriented Tasks in Large Language Models
item.description: TokenScope: Token-Level Explainability and Interpretability for Code-Oriented Tasks in Large Language Models

item.description: Safeguarding LLM Agents from Misalignment through Provenance Analysis

item.description: Kara: Efficient Reasoning LLM Serving via Sliding-Window KV Cache Compression

item.description: SPARCLE: SPeaker-aware Aligned Representations via Contrastive Language Embeddings

item.description: Breaking Safety at the Token Boundary: How BPE Tokenization Creates Exploitable Gaps in LLM Alignment

item.description: RusFinChain: A Russian Benchmark for Verifiable Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Finance with Fuzzy-Aligned Evaluation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multi-Objective Exploration and Preference Optimization via Mutual Information
item.description: Multi-Objective Exploration and Preference Optimization via Mutual Information

item.description: MultAttnAttrib: Training-Free Multimodal Attribution in Long Document Question Answering

item.description: IsoSci: A Benchmark of Isomorphic Cross-Domain Science Problems for Evaluating Reasoning versus Knowledge Retrieval in LLMs

item.description: FaithMed: Training LLMs For Faithful Evidence-Based Medical Reasoning

item.description: Grounded Optimization: A Layered Engineering Framework for Reducing LLM Hallucination in Automated Personal Document Rewriting

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Comparing Architectures for Supervised Political Scaling
item.description: Comparing Architectures for Supervised Political Scaling

item.description: DiPS: Dialogue Policy Selection for High-Stakes Persuasion Agents

item.description: Beyond Skepticism: Evaluating LLMs Pedagogical Intent Reasoning with the Adaptive Pedagogical Vigilance Framework

item.description: ProWAFT: A ROMA-LPD Instance for Workload-Aware and Dynamic Fault Tolerance in FPGA-Based CNN Accelerators

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Does Generating More Help? Disentangling Fixed-Source Synthesis from Source Expansion in Synthetic Data Scaling
item.description: When Does Generating More Help? Disentangling Fixed-Source Synthesis from Source Expansion in Synthetic Data Scaling

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Rethinking Speech-LLM Integration for ASR: Effective Joint Speech-Text Training by Interleaving
item.description: Rethinking Speech-LLM Integration for ASR: Effective Joint Speech-Text Training by Interleaving

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PARTREP: Learning What to Repeat for Decoder-only LLMs
item.description: PARTREP: Learning What to Repeat for Decoder-only LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] On the Limits of Steering Vectors for Preference-Aligned Generation
item.description: On the Limits of Steering Vectors for Preference-Aligned Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PairCoder++: Pair Programming as a Universal Paradigm for Verified Code-Driven Multimodal and Structured-Artifact Generation
item.description: PairCoder++: Pair Programming as a Universal Paradigm for Verified Code-Driven Multimodal and Structured-Artifact Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Grammar Does the Work: Functional vs. Lexical Dependency Length Minimization Across Universal Dependencies
item.description: The Grammar Does the Work: Functional vs. Lexical Dependency Length Minimization Across Universal Dependencies

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TUDUM: A Turkish-Thinking Reasoning Pipeline for Qwen3.5-27B
item.description: TUDUM: A Turkish-Thinking Reasoning Pipeline for Qwen3.5-27B

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multilayer Q-Matrix-Embedded Neural Network for Cognitive Diagnosis (M-QCDNet): Structure-Aware Deep Learning Architecture for Psychometric Interpretability
item.description: M-QCDNet embeds cognitive diagnostic structures into neural networks via Q-matrix priors, balancing interpretability with predictive performance in skill assessment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] I\textsuperscript{2}RiMA: Spectral Riemannian Representation with Temporal Attention for Mental Stress Detection based on EEG Signals
item.description: I²RiMA uses Riemannian geometry and spectral-temporal attention to improve cross-subject EEG stress detection, achieving 82.78% balanced accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fixed-Set Robustness in Programming by Example: Example Corruption and Semantic Partition Recovery
item.description: Programming-by-example systems vulnerable to adversarial example corruption; version-space partition aggregation defense only partially mitigates this failure mode.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Domain Knowledge Based Temporal-Spatial Graph Convolution Network for ECG Recognition
item.description: Domain knowledge-based temporal-spatial graph convolution network improves ECG recognition with 88.1% F1 score, outperforming existing models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scaling Laws for Grid-Based Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search in High Dimensions
item.description: Multiprobe grid algorithms maintain constant dimensional scaling for approximate nearest neighbor search while competing methods show degrading throughput.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] IonSense-QKG: A Quantum-Readiness Metadata Framework for Lithium-Ion Battery Dataset Discovery
item.description: IonSense-QKG framework enriches lithium-ion battery datasets with quantum-readiness metadata and scoring to identify datasets suitable for hybrid quantum-classical machine-learning applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Novel Machine Learning Approach for Central Nervous System Tumor Classification from DNA Methylation
item.description: Novel ML approach using DNA methylation achieves 86-93% accuracy for CNS tumor classification, improving state-of-the-art results by 4-5 percentage points.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Approximation to Emergence: A Theory of Deep Learning
item.description: Monograph presents unified theory of deep learning connecting classical foundations to contemporary mechanisms including transformers, scaling laws, and emergence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Black-Box Inference of LLM Architectural Properties with Restrictive API Access
item.description: Black-Box Inference of LLM Architectural Properties with Restrictive API Access

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multi-modal Rail Crossing Safety Analysis
item.description: Multi-modal Rail Crossing Safety Analysis

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] How Should Transformers Encode Numeric Values in Electronic Health Records?
item.description: How Should Transformers Encode Numeric Values in Electronic Health Records?

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] NeuroBridge: Bridging Multi-Task MRI Knowledge for Neurodegenerative Disease Diagnosis
item.description: NeuroBridge: Bridging Multi-Task MRI Knowledge for Neurodegenerative Disease Diagnosis

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spin-Weighted Spherical Harmonics Enable Complete and Scalable $\mathrm{E}(3)$-Equivariant Networks
item.description: Spin-Weighted Spherical Harmonics Enable Complete and Scalable $\mathrm{E}(3)$-Equivariant Networks

item.description: The Rollout Infrastructure Tax in Coding-Agent Reinforcement Learning

item.description: Conditional Inference Trees and Forests for Feature Selection
